senses.definition: the fact of not being able to do something

examples.en: the government’s inability to provide basic services
examples.cn: 政府在提供基本服务方面的无能

examples.en: Some families go without medical treatment because of their inability to pay.
examples.cn: 有些家庭因无力支付医疗费用而得不到医治。

extra_examples.en: He has to overcome his inability to assert himself.
extra_examples.cn: 他必须克服不会坚持自己主张的缺点。

extra_examples.en: Her outbursts reflected her inability to cope with the loss of her brother.
extra_examples.cn: 她的突然发脾气说明她无法应对失去兄弟这一事实。

extra_examples.en: His experiences as a child explain his inability to sustain relationships.
extra_examples.cn: 他童年的经历可以解释他为何无法维持人际关系。

extra_examples.en: She felt increasingly frustrated by her inability to demonstrate her ideas.
extra_examples.cn: 她因为无法表明自己的想法而越来越沮丧。

extra_examples.en: She has an inability to control her rage.
extra_examples.cn: 她无法控制自己的愤怒。
